title: Mob Dismemberment [UNOFFICIAL MODERN PORT]
description: A port of iChun's Mob Dismemberment mod
body:
**The satisfying gib mod, now on modern Minecraft**

***

Killing mobs in vanilla Minecraft feels a bit… anticlimactic. They just poof into smoke and drop some items. Where's the impact? Where's the _crunch_?

Mob Dismemberment fixes that. When you slay zombies, skeletons, creepers, and other mobs, they don't just disappear — they **break apart into pieces**. Limbs scatter. Heads roll. It's visceral, satisfying, and makes every kill feel like it matters.

This is an **unofficial port** of iChun's classic Mob Dismemberment mod, originally created over a decade ago and beloved by millions. All credit for the original concept and implementation goes to **iChun**. This port simply brings the mod forward to modern Minecraft versions.

## Features

*   **Gib Deaths** — Mobs shatter into body parts when killed instead of playing the standard death animation
*   **Explosion Physics** — Gibs fly further when mobs are killed by explosions (TNT, creepers, etc.)
*   **Configurable** — Adjust blood effects and other settings to your preference
*   **Client-Side Only** — Install on your client and play anywhere, no server installation needed

***

## Installation

1.  Install Minecraft
2.  Install **Forge**
3.  Drop the mod into your `/mods` folder
4.  Slay some mobs and enjoy the carnage

***

## Important Notes

> **This is an unofficial port.** I am not the original creator of Mob Dismemberment. All credit goes to **iChun** for the original mod. This project exists to keep this classic mod available for players on modern Minecraft versions.

***

## Links

*   [Original Mob Dismemberment on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-dismemberment)
*   [iChun's Blog](https://ichun.me/mods/mob-dismemberment/)
*   [Original Source Code](https://github.com/iChun/Mob-Dismemberment)
*   [My Github](https://github.com/ThatSoulyGuy/Mob-Dismemberment)

***

## Configuration

A config file is generated in `/config/` where you can:

*   Enable/disable blood effects
*   Adjust maximum gib count
*   Configure other visual settings

***

## Found a Bug?

Report issues on the GitHub issues [page](https://github.com/ThatSoulyGuy/Mob-Dismemberment/issues) with:

*   A description of the problem
*   Steps to reproduce
*   Relevant screenshots or crash logs

***

## Credits

*   **iChun** — Original Mob Dismemberment creator
*   **ThatSoulyGuy** — port and maintenance

***

_Make every kill count._
